config.pipeline: EmoNarrifyPipeline use_fallback=True (Phase 2 bypassed, Phase 3 driven by lookup_table[Phase 1 emotion_label])
config.ser_caveat: 4-class IEMOCAP (neu/hap/ang/sad); 'surprise' GT routes to nearest 4-class label since SER has no surprise output node.
